summary: Video for National Child Abuse Prevention Month in which an HSI unit chief speaks to camera about the agency's work on child exploitation, bookended by text cards ('We are working to keep kids safe') over a blue wood-plank background. The video consists of spoken remarks with no music track.
notable_text: WE ARE WORKING TO KEEP KIDS SAFE; NATIONAL CHILD ABUSE PREVENTION MONTH; TOGETHER, WE CAN KEEP OUR KIDS SAFE; HSI IS COMMITTED TO PROTECTING
